metadata.instruction: Recover the file Task ID 79.jpg from Recycle Bin and verify whether it is restored to its previous location in Documents > Task 79 folder.
metadata.context: I accidentally deleted a file with the name Task ID 79.jpg.

focused_element.name: Terminal 1, python Use Alt+F1 for terminal accessibility help

l3.rationale: Esc dismisses the terminal/help overlay.

l4.rationale: Moved between windows and dismissed overlays to get from VS Code back to the desktop/File Explorer workspace.

l5.rationale: Window switching, minimizing, and opening steps are navigation to get into the Recycle Bin before any file operation.
